_comment: TEMPLATE for the canonical ERC-8004 live path on Base mainnet (chainId 8453). Copy to addresses.base.json and fill ReviewGate/attestor/agents after deploying. The two 0x8004... registry addresses are the CANONICAL ERC-8004 deployments, verified live on Base 2026-06-12 (see docs/CANONICAL-8004-SPIKE.md). DO NOT point the backend at these without reading the spike: the canonical giveFeedback ABI differs from our mock (no feedbackAuth, client == msg.sender, getSummary requires an explicit clientAddresses list).
